text:
for at least 
one of the three opioid-use disorder sub-category conditions: 
Diagnosis and Procedure Basis for OUD (OUD_DX_MEDICARE), 
Opioid-Related Hospitalization or ED (OUD_HOSP_MEDICARE), or 
Use of Medication-Assisted Treatment (MAT) (OUD_MAT_MEDICARE). 
You can find more detailed information on the criteria on the CCW website: 
https://www.ccwdata.org/web/guest/condition-categories
